title: senecio resectus
intro: Senecio resectus, also known as narrow-leaved fireweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Senecio resectus is often used in herbal preparations like infusions, teas, and tinctures, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
